task.name: validate-character

metadata.description: Validate a character identity.json file against characters/character-schema.json, checking required fields, directory consistency, voice config, and active selections.

input.name: identity_file
input.description: Character identity definition file to validate.

input.name: character_schema
input.description: JSON Schema defining the required structure for character identity files.

output.description: Validation report with pass/fail per check and detailed findings.

step.name: Load Identity
step.description: Load and parse the character identity file and schema.

actions.action: Parse JSON. If parse fails, abort with syntax error details.
Read characters/character-schema.json (if exists). If not found, skip schema validation with warning.
Initialize validation counters: total_checks = 0, passed = 0, warnings = 0, failed = 0

CHECK [SCH-001]: JSON Schema Compliance If character-schema.json exists: - Validate identity.json against it - For each schema violation: FAIL with field path and error message - If no violations: PASS If schema not found: WARN "character-schema.json not found -- schema validation skipped."

step.name: Required Fields
step.description: Check that all required fields are present and valid.

actions.action: CHECK [CHR-001]: character_id Present - identity.character_id must exist and be a non-empty string - If missing or empty: FAIL
CHECK [CHR-002]: name Present - identity.name must exist and be a non-empty string - If missing or empty: FAIL
CHECK [CHR-003]: type Present and Valid - identity.type must exist and be one of: "visual-voice", "visual-only", "voice-only" - If missing or invalid value: FAIL

CHECK [CHR-004]: prompt_tokens.core_identity Present - identity.prompt_tokens.core_identity must exist and be a non-empty string - This is the primary text injected into all prompts for this character - If missing or empty: FAIL

step.name: Directory Consistency
step.description: Verify character_id matches directory and all referenced directories exist.

actions.action: CHECK [DIR-001]: character_id Matches Directory Name - The character_id value must exactly match the name of its containing directory - directory_name = basename of characters/{character_id}/ - If character_id != directory_name: FAIL

CHECK [DIR-002]: Referenced Style Directories Exist For each style in identity.available_styles: - Verify characters/{character_id}/styles/{style}/ directory exists - If missing: FAIL "Style '{style}' listed but directory not found"

CHECK [DIR-003]: Referenced Outfit Directories Exist For each style_key in identity.available_outfits: For each outfit_name in available_outfits[style_key]: - Verify characters/{character_id}/styles/{style_key}/outfits/{outfit_name}/ exists - If missing: FAIL "Outfit '{outfit_name}' for style '{style_key}' directory not found"

step.name: Voice Configuration
step.description: Check voice config presence and validity based on character type.

actions.action: CHECK [VOX-001]: Voice Config Present for Voice Types If identity.type is "visual-voice" OR "voice-only": - identity.voice must exist and be non-empty - If voice block is missing: FAIL "Character type '{type}' requires voice configuration"

CHECK [VOX-002]: Voice Config Fields Complete If identity.voice exists: - voice.provider should be present (e.g., "elevenlabs") - voice.voice_id should be present - voice.language should be present - If any are missing: WARN "Voice config is incomplete -- missing {field}"

step.name: Active Selections
step.description: Verify active_style and active_outfit point to valid entries.

actions.action: CHECK [ACT-001]: active_style in available_styles - If identity.active_style is defined: - It must be one of the values in identity.available_styles - If not found in available_styles: FAIL - If active_style is not defined: WARN "active_style not set"

CHECK [ACT-002]: active_outfit in available_outfits[active_style] - If both active_outfit and active_style are defined: - active_outfit must be in identity.available_outfits[active_style] list - If not found: FAIL "active_outfit '{active_outfit}' not in outfits for style '{active_style}'" - If active_outfit defined but active_style is not: WARN "Cannot validate outfit without active style"

step.name: Compile Report
step.description: Compile all results and write the validation report.

actions.action: Count: total_checks, passed, warnings, failed overall_status: "PASS" if failed == 0, "FAIL" otherwise

task.output_schema:
# validation-report.yaml
character_id: "{character_id}" identity_path: "characters/{character_id}/identity.json" schema_path: "characters/character-schema.json" validated_at: "{ISO-8601 timestamp}"
summary: overall_status: "{PASS|FAIL}" total_checks: {int} passed: {int} warnings: {int} failed: {int}
checks: - rule_id: "{rule_id}" name: "{rule name}" severity: "{error|warning}" status: "{pass|warn|fail}" details: "{description of issue if failed, null if passed}" field_path: "{JSON path to affected field}"
schema_violations: - field: "{JSON path}" message: "{schema error message}" expected: "{expected value or type}" actual: "{actual value or type}"
recommendations: - "{actionable recommendation for each failure}"

error.action: HALT: "Character identity file not found at characters/{character_id}/identity.json"
WARN: "character-schema.json not found -- schema validation skipped." Continue with field-level validation.
WARN: "Failed to parse character-schema.json -- schema validation skipped." Continue with field-level validation.
